event.name: MonkeDAO Romania - 2026 Kickoff
event.description:
2026 is here 🐒✨

Let’s celebrate it together, Monke style. We’ll look back at the year behind us, share what’s coming next, and properly kick off the new year the Romanian way: good vibes, good people, and a relaxed atmosphere 🥂
Come as you are, bring your energy, and let’s enjoy the night together.
